description.zh-Hans: 渲染矩形墙壁截面，支持多种材质图案（石头、灰泥、木板、土坯）。完全可平铺。
description.en: Renders a rectangular wall section with various material patterns (stone, plaster, wood planks, adobe). Fully tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 墙壁, 墙面, 石墙, 灰泥墙, 木板墙, 土坯墙, 建筑
triggers.en: wall, stone wall, plaster, wood planks, adobe, architectural

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 渲染不同风格墙壁截面（石头、灰泥、木板、土坯），用于建筑或室内场景。
exampleUsage.en: Render various wall sections (stone, plaster, wood planks, adobe) for architectural or interior scenes.
